name: @quartermaster-labs/pi-on-demand-context
description_en: Pi extension. Auto-loads CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md context when the model works in a dir — via bash `cd` or any file tool (read/edit/write/grep/ls/find). Injected once, durably; deduped against pi's own loader.
description_zh: Pi 扩展。当模型在目录中工作时自动加载 CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md 上下文 — 通过 bash `cd` 或任何文件工具（read/edit/write/grep/ls/find）。一次性注入，持久有效；与 pi 自身加载器去重
